description: Navigate to ChatGPT, send a prompt in a new conversation, and extract the response text.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: ChatGPT uses a textarea element with id='prompt-textarea' for input. The send button has data-testid='send-button'. Responses render in div elements with data-message-author-role='assistant'. The page is a Next.js SPA.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use data-testid attributes where available (send-button, conversation-turn). Fall back to aria labels and role attributes. The prompt textarea has a known id. Response containers use data-message-author-role for reliable targeting.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: ChatGPT requires authentication via OpenAI account. Use saved session cookies. Typing simulation with human-like delays. Rate limit to 1 prompt per 5 seconds minimum.
reasoning.performance: Expected run time: 30-120 seconds depending on response length (navigation 3s + typing 5s + response generation 20-100s + extraction 2s).

prompt.description: The prompt text to send to ChatGPT.
prompt.example: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP in 3 sentences.

wait_timeout_s.description: Maximum seconds to wait for ChatGPT to finish responding. Default 120.

new_conversation.description: Whether to start a new conversation. Default true.

steps.description: Navigate to ChatGPT homepage for a new conversation
Verify ChatGPT authentication is active — if redirected to login, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Wait for the prompt textarea to be ready
Type the prompt into the textarea with human-like delays
Click the send button to submit the prompt
Wait for the assistant response container to appear
Wait for ChatGPT to finish generating the response (no new content for 3 seconds)
Extract the full response text and HTML from the last assistant message
Return the extracted response as structured data

response_text.description: Plain text content of ChatGPT's response

response_html.description: HTML content of ChatGPT's response (preserves formatting)

has_code_blocks.description: Whether the response contains code blocks

prompt_sent.description: The original prompt that was sent

error_handling.session_expired: Detect auth.openai.com redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED error
error_handling.rate_limited: Detect rate limit or usage cap message — abort with RATE_LIMITED error and cooldown
error_handling.response_timeout: If response does not stabilize within wait_timeout_s, extract partial response and flag as PARTIAL
error_handling.empty_response: If no response container found after 30s, abort with NO_RESPONSE error
error_handling.selector_timeout: Retry once with 20s timeout, then abort
